question: This Market will Resolve at number of Traders%
textDescription:
Resolution

This market will resolve at the number of trader % at the time this market closes.

Example 54 traders will resolve to 54%

If number of traders >= 100 market will resolve to YES

If number of traders = 0 market will resolve to NO

About this market/account

The only way this account can make mana from trader bonuses. This account is dedicated to making interesting and cool markets. If you would like to support this cause donations will be appreciated.
